title: vernonia obtusa var. parkeri
intro: Vernonia obtusa var. parkeri, also known as the Indian ironweed, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Vernonia obtusa var. parkeri include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal products, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to treat various health conditions.
